line: You think I'd lie to you about why we're on vacation, Morty? I wouldn't lie to you. [Morty glares at him.] Well, that's a lie. Huh.

name: Summer
line: So someone out there is trying to kill us?

name: Rick
line: Someone's always trying to kill us. That's what the decoys are for. They go on fun, self-contained terrestrial adventures, and–[a bomb smashes through the window] take bullets meant for us. Shit.

name: Jerry
line: Ahhh! No!

name: Rick
line: Ah, shit. Decoy family.

name: Morty
line: I think dad was still outside. What's a decoy family?

name: Rick
line: Hard concept, Morty. Hard concept. I've never really cracked it, if I'm being honest. Decided it was maybe better as a kind of kinetic mislead for another special episode!

name: Morty
line: Oh, cool!

name: TV
line: We now return to When Wolf.

name: Rick
line: Woah, a time traveling wolf? Count me in.

name: Morty
line: Yeah, I never thought of the 'were' in 'werewolf' like 'who, what, when and where!' Clever wordplay!

name: Dracula
line: When Wolf!

name: When Wolf
line: Dracula! You know why I'm here.

name: Dracula
line: I'm safe here, Ian! Christianity hasn't been invented yet, crosses are just baby t's to me now! I got out. Please, don't invite me back in.

name: Morty
line: Huh, kinda mucked it up with this Dracula stuff.

name: Rick
line: You're right. It shows a lack of faith in their core concept. I'd much rather watch When Wolf go to the 20's and invest in the stock market, but then eat people.

name: Morty
line: Yeah.

name: Rick
line: Look, if you really want to know what happened to Beth's mom, it–[his watch beeps] whoop. Squid aliens just killed a decoy family.

name: Beth
line: Decoy family? You made more clones?

name: Rick
line: Clones are, like, thirty-two percent of all sci-fi, sweetie. You don't get to own clones. Yes, I made some decoys. They're exactly like us, with a few tweaks and a backdoor shutdown.

name: Beth
line: Do you just get hard creating sentient life?

name: Rick
line: Actually, I get hard protecting my family!

name: Summer
line: Ew.

name: Morty
line: Ugh, gross!

name: Beth
line: Yeah, now everyone gets killer doppelgängers. Cool deal.

name: Rick
line: The decoys are harmless, Beth.

name: Summer
line: Grandpa Rick, do the decoys know they're decoys?

name: Rick
line: They wouldn't be very good decoys if they did, Sum-sum.

name: Summer
line: So they think they're us?

name: Rick
line: That's the deal.

name: Summer
line: How do you know we're not decoys? [Rick stops eating and drops his fork.] Oh my god, we're decoys.

name: Rick
line: Oh, god! We might not be real! We might be decoys! Morty, quick!

name: Morty
line: What do I do?

name: Rick
line: My failsafe, Morty. My final, secret failsafe. It proves I'm real, you have to help me, I'd never joke about this. [He pulls his pants down and sticks his ass in Morty's face.] There's a barcode, Morty. A barcode on the interior of my left ass cheek.

name: Morty
line: What?

name: Rick
line: Morty, please, I'm begging you!

name: Morty
line: I'm not looking at your ass!

name: Rick
line: Please, Morty, is it there? God damn it! [He tears up.] Just tell me if I'm real!

name: Summer
line: Morty, do it!

name: Morty
line: Gross!

name: Beth
line: Dad!

name: Rick
line: Summer, you fucking idiot. We're not decoys.

name: Morty
line: Why did I get punished?

name: Rick
line: A, decoys don't build decoys, and B, you think the mere suggestion I'm fake would break me? Christ, I'm not your mom.

name: Beth
line: Fuck off.

name: Rick
line: Jeez, these guys really wanna kill me bad. Alright, here's the plan. We're gonna hide out with a decoy family, and when these squids show up, we jump their asses. Jerry! Come on! Family emergency!

name: Jerry
line: A bigger emergency than my lemon squares not setting? They're gluten free, sugar free, and lemon free!

name: Decoy Rick
line: Think you got the wrong house, bro.

name: Rick
line: Analysis mode, password 8-0-0-8-5.

name: Beth
line: Kind of expected a funnier password.

name: Rick
line: I didn't plan on showing them off.

name: Morty
line: [examining his decoy] Damn, like Westworld!

name: Rick
line: Yes, Morty, like Westworld. But don't fuck them. [Summer starts going up the stairs.] Summer!

name: Summer
line: Whatever, creep. I'm gonna see how accurate you got my room.

name: Morty
line: Rick, when you say you made an exact replica of the house, did you mean like, you know, an exact replica?

name: Rick
line: I know about the Yosemite t-shirt, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Shit.

name: Rick
line: You know you can use tissues, right?

name: Morty
line: I can't finish without it.

name: Beth
line: So you do know what a happy family looks like.

name: Rick
line: I know what a fake one looks like.

name: Morty
line: Uh, Rick?

name: Rick
line: [pokes his head into the lab] What?

name: Morty
line: Did you use this house to make decoys, too?

name: Rick
line: [descending the ladder] What? Morty, why the fuck would I do that? You think I'd go somewhere else to– [he sees what Morty is looking at—decoy making equipment, exoskeletons, and blueprints] okay, well, I am now less worried about the squids. [Rick runs up to the frozen decoy Rick.] Isolate head at normal processing. [The decoy's head unfreezes and Rick slaps him in the face.] What the fuck do you think you're doing down there? You're making decoys?

name: Decoy Rick
line: Wait, how do you—oh god, Summer was right.

name: Rick
line: Everyone in the car.

name: Beth
line: You said decoys didn't make decoys.

name: Rick
line: And usually, they don't, but again, it's nothing to worry about, because decoys are harmless. [He pulls up a map of where the decoys are located.] Just have to, y'know, visit the rest and terminate the program.

name: Beth
line: Terminate? They're alive, dad!

name: Rick
line: And at some point, they won't be. That's how existing works. What, are you going to save every stray cat?

name: Beth
line: No, but I can resist making more of them in a lab.

name: Rick
line: Ugh. Look, save the empathy. It's more termite infestation than Blade Runner.

name: Summer
line: I still think we're decoys.

name: Morty
line: You just want an excuse to stop trying.

name: Summer
line: Yeah, and?

name: Jerry
line: [pointing] Oooh, there's a handsome fellow!

name: Rick
line: Uh-oh.

name: Beth
line: I thought you made them harmless.

name: Rick
line: I don't remember making this one. [He gets out of the car.]

name: Decoy Jerry
line: Oh, hi, Rick! Family...me...? Hey, when did you all leave?

name: Rick
line: Analysis mode, 8-0-0-8-5.

name: Decoy Jerry
line: Hmm?

name: Rick
line: Nothing, buddy. You gotta stop with all that coffee, it's making you loopy! Happy analysis mode! [The family heads inside.]

name: Decoy Jerry
line: Happy analysis mode to you, too!

name: Decoy Rick
line: Think you got the wrong house, bro.

name: Rick
line: Analysis mode, password 8-0-0–

name: Decoy Rick
line: Shit, you think I'm a decoy?

name: Rick
line: How do you know about the decoys?

name: Decoy Rick

name: Decoy Jerry

name: Rick

name: Morty
line: What?

name: Rick
line: Hide!

name: Second Morty
line: Wow, like Ex Machina!

name: Second Summer
line: Whatever, weirdo. I'm gonna see how wrong you got my room.

name: Second Beth
line: So you do know what a loving family looks like.

name: Second Rick
line: A simulated one, yes.

name: Beth
line: Why are we hiding?

name: Rick
line: He thinks he's me, and I was about to start terminating decoys.

name: Beth
line: But we're not decoys!

name: Rick
line: Sure, tell him that.

name: Second Morty
line: Rick, did you make decoys here, too?

name: Second Rick
line: Morty, for what reason could I have for...what the–[he runs up to decoy Rick] isolate head at normal processing! [He punches decoy Rick in the face as his head unfreezes.] You dumb asshole, you made decoys?

name: Decoy Rick
line: Again, they were my idea. Wait, what happened to the other guy?

name: Second Rick
line: Other guy?

name: Decoy Rick
line: Wait, that means I'm a decoy. Fucking Summer.

name: Second Rick

name: Rick

name: Second Rick

name: Rick

name: Beth

line: Car, can I get a whiteboard? line: What up, you decoy motherfuckers? Come on down to Rick's house of squids, where I'm serving your ass on a platter! ( Both scream ) ( Marines screaming ) Who-who's shooting at us?! Oh, wow, that's unexpected. The sperm made a catapult?! A-A-Are they getting smarter?!

line: No, you're getting dumber because that's a trebuchet.

name: Rick
line: A human egg? Where-where-where did you get it?

name: Morty
line: Mister President! It's Morty! It's my sperm! I-It's all mine!

name: All
line: Boil him up! Yum, yum! Spice him right! Oh, boy! Eat the flesh! Yum, yum! Not the bones! Oh, no! Belly ache! Ouch, Ouch!

name: Rick
line: What about horsepower?

name: CHUDs
line: CHUDily dudily, ho, ho, ho!

name: Houston
line: Permission granted. Firing breach now. Explorer, our readouts show a pressure spike. Everything all right? Honestly, sometimes staring back at Earth makes me think about the people I left behind... my wife, the son she had to anchor me there. I tried to be a parent, I really did, but I've come to find I'm only suited to be a spaceman. The nicest part of being up here is there are no reminders of the guilt I sometimes feel about abandoning my family. ( Indistinct babbling ) Sorry, Houston, I thought I heard something. Negative on our end. No, wait, there's something big and it's coming right at you! Goo, goo, gah, gah. Dear God. No! You can't be real! Explorer, what is it? What the hell do you see?! My conscience. Explorer! Explorer! Aaah! Are you there? Aaaaaah! Geez. Not gonna miss that guy. Aaaaah! Right? So dramatic.

name: Man
line: Did you get any of that? ♪ ♪

convert user to thought.
Inject thought into mind.

name: Alien Woman
line: It's the Crow Man!

name: Owl #1
line: Give it a second. Maybe he's taking it out to surrender.

name: Alien Man
line: He's anti-heroic. Run!

name: Owl #2
line: I don't understand!

name: Owl #3
line: He's only one man!

name: Rick
line: With the power of a thousand crows.

name: Owl #3
line: Good luck.

name: Owl #2
line: Crows and owls have always been at war, but why do you care?! What's the point?

name: Rick
line: Here's two.

name: Morty
line: Haha, yeah, cool.

name: Rick
line: Morty?

name: Morty
line: H-hey man. G-good to see you. (emerges from the crowd) Y-you're like, looking like, into crows. Still.

name: Rick
line: Oh, uh, Two Crows, you remember Morty. Morty, Two Crows. It's good to see you, but give me more of a heads-up.

name: Morty
line: Oh well I-I was just in the neighborhood. I-it wasn't like—

name: Rick
line: It's just that the battle for crows is kinda never-ending.

name: Morty
line: Huh. Right. A little pointless then, right? That… came out wrong. S-sounded judgey.

name: Crow Horse
line: Crow Horse. Crow Horse. Crow Horse.

name: Morty
line: Okay. It looks like— it looks like they're leading you to a thing.

name: Rick
line: Take care, Morty.

name: Morty
line: You-you too. U-uh I'm doing good, by the way. Oh, my dad was gonna eat that yogurt you left in the fridge, but I-I told him—

name: Rick
line: Ahem. I'm lookin' for Crowscare. The scarecrow? The evil scarecrow. Come on, whoever gives him up first lives.

name: Rick
line: Fine, I can kill an extra asshole. Helps me get my steps in.

name: Morty
line: Rick!

name: Rick
line: Morty?

name: Pussifer
line: Wood??

name: Rick
line: Uh, Morty. Why are you now like forty?

name: Morty
line: Th-that's how long it's been, Rick.

name: Rick
line: Oh. Um, I guess we can have a drink together then.

name: Morty
line: Do you have a rum and Coke?

name: Waiter
line: What are you, twenty?

name: Morty
line: Oh-ho-ho. Bless your heart.

name: Rick
line: Time be goin' by, don't she? (sips beer)

name: Morty
line: That's your reaction to finding out you wasted your entire life?

name: Rick
line: I feel okay.

name: Morty
line: Well-well, what about me?

name: Rick
line: Woah. Excuse us boys, you don't wanna be here for this.

name: Morty
line: I thought if I gave you enough space, you'd outgrow this phase.

name: Waiter
line: Here's your drink, poser.

name: Morty
line: Dad got sick, you know. Stage Four. Heh, you woulda loved it. Summer's a nurse. Well, pretty much a nurse. Sh-she married a junkie. Rick, come home. While we still got a little time.

name: Rick
line: Morty, what we had wasn't healthy.

name: Morty
line: And this is? Y-y-you had a thousand adventures with these crows. When are you gonna kill their big bad?

name: Rick
line: First off, the 'will-they kill-they' is everything to my guys. And second, fuck you for trying to undermine my happiness.

name: Morty
line: This may be the last time you lay eyes on me!

name: Rick
line: I hope that's not true, Morty. Because you look like sh-(burps)-shit, and this is not how I wanna remember you.

name: Crowscare
line: Now that I have his two crows, nothing will stop me from eliminating Crow Rick!

name: Crowscare
line: Don't defend him to me, I don't even get what you see in him.

name: Crowscare
line: You're right, we should be enjoying the time we have together.

name: Crowscare
line: Crow Rick! Oh, I know what this must look like but—

name: Rick
line: Looks like my arch-nemesis Crow Scare and my sidekicks planning adventures together.

name: Crowscare
line: You are hardly the victim here. I was adventuring with these two crows before you ever came along.

name: Rick
line: What do you mean, 'using me as a rebound'?

name: Rick
line: You feel like I was using you as a rebound too? Well shit, this lost all meaning. Guess it could've been worse. At least 'adventuring' was just a metaphor for romantic partnership, so it's not a real breakup.

name: Crowscare
line: Speak for yourself. We immensely enjoy each other's bodies.

name: Rick
line: What?! Eugh, no!

name: Crowscare
line: Sounds like the man's asking for proof! Let's show him, fellas!

name: Rick
line: I-I asked for zero proof. Zero proof!

name: Rick
line: I'm giving you free will. Yah!

name: Crow Horse
line: Submit to Crow Horse!

name: Rick
line: Whoops.

name: Morty
line: R-Rick?

name: Rick
line: Wubba lubba dub dub! I'm back, pal!

name: Jerry
line: Morty, who's at the door?

name: Rick
line: Wait a minute, I thought you died gruesomely. W-What the hell's going on here?

name: Morty
line: See, um, th-the thing is, uh—

name: Beth
line: Can you please make Morty fourteen again, Dad? This is ridiculous.

name: Morty
line: Okay, look, I-I may have used an Aging Serum to kind of emotionally blackmail you a little.

name: Rick
line: I kinda figured and I totally get it, Morty. I-I'm done with the Two Crows; like, they were super clingy, and I'm ready to make this work.

name: Morty
line: Let's just hit the Reset Button.

name: Beth
line: Well no, honey, not a reset. Okay? Tell your grandpa that you're worthy of his respect and you wanna be treated differently from now on.

name: Morty
line: I refuse to do that, I'm desperate to get back together.

name: Jerry
line: Just like his old man.

name: Rick
line: Don't worry honey, that's just Morty's middle-age talking. He'll be less codependent once we get more of his life in front of him again.

name: Summer
line: Uh, I'd like him to stay forty so he can keep buying my friends molly!

name: Summer
line: I'd rather throw my vote away than use it to support a flawed system.

name: Morty
line: Can we make our first adventure fixing this? I-I keep thinking about lawn care.

name: Rick
line: Okay buddy, who sold you this shitty aging serum? What did he look like?

name: Morty
line: Just like you! I-I got it from The Citadel.

name: Rick
line: Hot damn! Hitting the ground running with a Citadel episode. See ya later, masturbators!

name: Andy
line: Hi! I'm the Citadel's new mascot, Andy. Because this place wouldn't be home without Ricks Andy Morties!

name: Morty
line: Dumb.

name: Rick
line: Oof. What happened to this place?

name: Morty
line: There's a Morty president now. (gestures to a 'Salute President Morty' poster above a cafe.)

name: Rick
line: Ah, that's cute. They rebuilt. They made it nicer.

name: Morty
line: They made it Glendale.

name: Rick
line: Goddamn, you are cantankerous.

name: Morty
line: Even pooping hurts now.

name: Rick
line: Yeah, well, this place is gonna fix you right up.

name: Employee Morty
line: Okay, so we've got a standard Morty that's been aged to... forty?

name: Rick
line: Can you reverse it?

name: Employee Morty
line: Well if you look at it like a bone, what we can do is break his age in two places, remove the middle, and graft its ends back together.

name: Morty
line: Th-th-that sounds really violent.

name: Rick
line: It's not a literal bone, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Oh, okay.

name: Employee Morty
line: Brace yourself, the process does also break every bone in your body.

name: Morty
line: Wait!

name: Morty
line: Aaaah!!! Ooh, ow!

name: Toddler Morty #1
line: I like crayons.

name: Toddler Morty #2
line: Girls are gross.

name: Morty
line: I-I-I think I feel like myself again!

name: Rick
line: Eh, you look a little weird. Your skin's all pink like a baby mouse. Is that normal?

name: Employee Morty
line: Probably. Uh, sign here for storage or disposal of the twenty-six years we removed.

name: Rick
line: Wait, what? I ain't payin' to store twenty-six years!

name: Employee Morty
line: Well, then you're taking it with you.

name: Adult Morty
line: I'm almost ready to sell out.

name: Rick
line: Alright, what's disposal cost?

name: Adult Morty
line: S-something unfair's happening!

name: Deformed Morty
line: There's no escape. No escape!

name: Adult Morty
line: Let me help you. This is not a good look!

name: Rick
line: Oh boy.

name: Morty
line: Hey, they shot me!

name: Police Morty #2
line: You are seriously hurting the Citadel experience.

name: Deformed Morty
line: Listen to me!

name: Police Morty #2
line: Drop the gun!

name: Deformed Morty
line: Death is coming for us all! And the Citadel is a weapon of mass destru--!

name: Rick
line: Woof. You're about to get suspended with pay. Come on, Morty. Let's get out of here before this gets political.

name: Adult Morty
line: U-uh... was I... influential?

name: Morty
line: Yeah, y-you were influential. You had like seven— seven blogs.

name: Adult Morty
line: Tight. (dies)

name: Rick
line: Ugh. Too late.

name: Secret Service Rick
line: Rick C-137. President Morty requests you join him for dinner.

name: Morty
line: Whoa! S-seriously?

name: Rick
line: You know I destroyed this place.

name: Secret Service Rick
line: You've been pardoned for that, sir.

name: Morty
line: Rick, let's have dinner with the Morty president.

name: Rick
line: Morty, the idea was to get back to simple adventures. The Citadel runs on Canon.

name: Morty
line: Okay! I guess things really are going right back to how they were.

name: Rick
line: Fine! I could eat. But the second he reveals he's evil, we're gone.

name: Morty
line: I don't know. Tastes pretty good.

name: Rick
line: Okay, let me know if you start feeling poison-y. Good to have you back, buddy.

name: President Morty
line: Sorry I'm late. Never really ends around here.

name: Rick
line: Look at this, Morty. They really did make a you the president.

name: President Morty
line: And I hate ‘em every day for it. But wow, Rick C-137. Now that's a guy to move your schedule around for. Not-not here to blow the place up again, I hope. Haha.

name: Rick
line: Ha! Not unless you try to keep me here.

name: President Morty
line: Ah geez, wouldn't dream of it. But it's amazing you dropped by, because I was eventually gonna hunt you down.

name: Rick
line: There's the reveal! Let's dance. (draws gun)

name: President Morty
line: Ha! Geez.

name: Morty
line: Come on, man. The guy got elected president. By Ricks and Morties. He's being really nice.

name: Rick
line: All politicians are nice. (puts gun away)

name: President Morty
line: He's a hot bag of peanuts, isn't he?

name: Morty
line: We've been through a lot, a-and he does not like—

name: Rick
line: Serialized drama.

name: President Morty
line: Right, no drama. Keep it episodic. Ricks never look back. Waste of a legend in his case. You know, he practically built this place.

name: Morty
line: Wait, what?

name: Rick
line: And now you're running it squeaky clean, right? That's why you got deformed Morties comin' up through the sewer lines talking about 'hope' and 'change'?

name: President Morty
line: Fair enough.

name: Morty
line: Good clap-back, Rick. What's the deal with that, Mr. P?

name: President Morty
line: I got a little project going on, acquired some hands-on labor. It would require less if you were willing to tell me how one might bring down the Central Finite Curve.

name: Rick
line: Alright, time to go, Morty.

name: Morty
line: I wanna know what he's talking about.

name: President Morty
line: Yeah, you've come all this way. Can you give me ten more seconds?

name: Rick
line: Literally ten? Because now it would be six.

name: President Morty
line: Oh, I'm fine with that. Make it two… one.

name: President Morty
line: Like I said, would've been a big help for you to tell me, but I should have everything I need from you now. Let me just make sure…

name: Rick
line: You can't scan an entire brain over appetizers.

name: President Morty
line: Oh, most of yours got scanned a looong time ago.

name: President Morty
line: You probably don't remember.

name: Rick Stan Lee
line: Check out Season One, Episode Nine, Rickheads. Excel-(burps)-cior!

name: Rick
line: Evil Rick!

name: Morty
line: We kicked his ass!

name: President Morty
line: 'Evil Rick!' I love it. Smartest man in the universe. With an ego so big, you could just grab it like a joystick.

name: President Morty
line: Looks complete. I was afraid I'd have to kill every Rick on the Citadel to get what I needed.

name: Morty
line: You asshole! I vouched for you! He only came here because I asked him to. I'm sorry, Rick.

name: Rick
line: That apology and a screwdriver in my hand would be worth a screwdriver.

name: President Morty
line: Pfft, you sell-out Mortys kill me. I'd hate you more than the Ricks you worship if there was any point. But you can't help it; you were bred for it. Wanna see?

name: President Morty
line: You already know rogue Ricks used Morties to hide themselves from the Citadel. But you might not know it worked so well that the Citadel became its own Morty market.

name: President Morty
line: And I'm sure you don't know how far they've gone to help supply meet demand. Sure, Ricks could scour infinity for naturally-occurring grandsons, but why bother? So much work. Such an admission of need.

name: President Morty
line: There aren't infinite versions of our grandfather, Morty. He's an infinite smear of one shitty old man, and he's attached to us infinitely through his weakness and our forgiveness. This is why we're with him. This is why we're alive.

name: Morty
line: What... the fuck?! Rick, say this isn't true!

name: Rick
line: It isn't the whole truth.

name: Morty/President Morty
line: Liar!/Liar.

name: Rick
line: It's complicated!

name: Morty
line: I'm not busy.

name: Rick
line: Okay, Morty, remember when all I said I needed was your apology and a screwdriver in my hand? Well, I forgot I literally have a screwdriver in my hand. I mean, duh-doi, I'm basically Inspector Gadget.

name: President Morty
line: (calmly) Uh-oh.

name: President Morty
line: It's okay, he's free to go. He's the Rickest Rick. We'll never see him again.

name: Rick
line: Morty, when you came here for that serum, did you refill this gun?

name: Morty
line: Yeah.

name: Morty
line: Holy shit!

name: Rick
line: I only know one man that ever hacked my portal gun, and it turned out it was evil you.

name: President/Evil Morty
line: Yay! He's all caught up.

name: Rick
line: Wait! Hold it, hold it!

name: Morty
line: Wh-who's that?

name: Rick
line: Time for Big Boy. Duck!

name: Morty
line: Does he like it?

name: Rick
line: He's a metaphor for capitalism, Morty. What do you think?

name: Rick
line: Yoink!

name: President/Evil Morty
line: You can't outrun your past, Rick.

name: President Morty
line: Tch. Did you think my force field would be down the second time?

name: Rick
line: I was expressing disapproval of your dialogue!

name: President Morty
line: Ahaha! Disapprove all you want. Tonight, the quality of dialogue stops mattering. Tonight, I do that thing I wanna do, with the Curve thing.

name: Loudspeaker System
line: Nobody leave, everybody stay. Nobody leave, everybody stay. Nobody leave, everybody stay...

name: Rick D-716
line: In uncertain times like these, I think it's important for me to say 'eat shit, fuck you!' The drug companies paid for me to say every word, I have millions of dollars, and I don't care—

name: Rick D-716
line: Oh, God! Oh fuck, no! Whoa--

name: Rick D-716
line: And I'd just like to say that prescription drugs are great and you should buy them now.

name: Morty
line: What's happening, Rick?!

name: Rick
line: He hacked the entire city's portal supply. Come on, there still might be one way out of here: out the bottom.

name: Morty
line: What do you think he needed from your brain?

name: Rick
line: I assume schematics for the Citadel's dimensional drive. If he's gonna use it to blow the Curve, we do not wanna be here.

name: Morty
line: What is the Central Finite Curve?

name: Rick
line: Q&A after our survival. Hopefully we can snag some untainted fluid at the source and get the fuck outta here!

name: Rick
line: Or not.

name: Rick
line: Wow. I thought my capitalism metaphor was on the nose.

name: Morty
line: So did you help build the Citadel? Did you just lie to me about everything?

name: Rick
line: Can't you just sneak through the cave base? We turned a new leaf, Morty. We're back to simple adventures.

name: Morty
line: It's not a new leaf until you tell me everything!

name: Rick
line: Morty, we really don't have time for this. The whole place is gonna blow.

name: Morty
line: No, I-I don't trust you. I-I-I don't wanna do this anymore if I'm not gonna get straight answers from you.

name: Rick
line: God damm it! (takes out the brain scanner) Here's my fucking downloaded brain, Morty. You wanna jump the shark? You wanna know my stupid crybaby backstory? Knock yourself out.

name: Rick
line: No-not now!

name: Morty
line: Whoa. Dead wife?

name: Rick
line: Yes. Now everyone can shut up about it.

name: Morty
line: Wow, Rick. I feel a lot better having seen all that.

name: Evil Morty
line: Of course that's the case. In their minds, they're the underdog.

name: Evil Morty
line: And that's how they justify this.

name: Rick
line: Morty, I'm not responsible for every fucked up Rick out there.

name: Evil Morty
line: They literally all say that. They all have that excuse; it's part of their system. None of them have to be responsible, they're all victims of themselves. (sarcastically) 'Oh, it's so hard to be a genius!' Couldn't you just die?

name: Morty
line: Well what are you doin' about it?

name: Evil Morty
line: Jack shit. I'm leaving. Do you know what the Central Finite Curve is? They built a wall around Infinity, separated all the infinite universes from all the infinite universes where he's the smartest man in the universe. Every version of us has spent every version of all of our lives in one infinite crib, built around an infinite fucking baby.

name: Evil Morty
line: And I'm leaving it. That's what makes me ‘evil', being sick of him. If you've ever been sick of him, you've been evil too.

name: Morty
line: Rick, did you really leave the crows for me? Or did you come back because they dumped you?

name: Evil Morty
line: There you go, kid! Now you're Evil Morty too. Sooner or later, we all are, on this side of the Curve.

name: Orange Afro Rick
line: Don't worry, Morty. We still got a way out they never thought of. Operation Phoenix.

name: Orange Afro Morty
line: Doesn't that still mean, like, death?!

name: Orange Afro Rick
line: Sure, but the joke's on them cuz we just found a backdoor to getting off this rock.

name: Female computer voice
line: Rerouted. Rerouted. Rerouted.

name: Female computer voice
line: Rerouted. Rerouted. Rerouted.

name: Morty
line: Oh my fucking God!

name: Rick
line: Come on Morty, we gotta go!

name: Morty
line: Woah!

name: President Morty
line: You can come if you want.

name: President Morty
line: Don't blame me if you don't.

name: Rick
line: Ugh. From where I sit, Morty, that's the best deal on the table. I-I don't have a real plan.

name: Rick
line: Thanks, pal. I-I'm glad you ignored my advice.

name: President Morty
line: It's just as well. I lied. That second seat's a toilet.

name: Morty
line: Oh, super dick move! But weirdly kind of cool to admit it.

name: Rick
line: Geez, you guys really are bred for forgiveness. Let's go.

name: Rick
line: Say goodbye to the Citadel, fellas.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Woo-wee! Evil Morty! That was quite a scheme. Makes me wonder if there's an evil me out there. But I guess, sometimes I look at my life, and I may not even need ‘im. Cause, well, guess I made a pretty big mess of things myself. Ooo-eee.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: I never got my job at the university back. Remember that? Rick made me do karate. It was kinda funny, but I guess things went downhill from there.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Started isolating myself from Amy. Used to tell her everything I was feeling.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: But then I guess I stopped.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Because I wanted her to love who she thought I was, not who I felt myself becoming.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Ever think about how horrified the people we love would be if they found out who we truly are? So we just dig ourselves deeper, into our lies every day, (he walks back over to the stove) ultimately only hurting the people who were brave enough to love us.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Wish I didn't do that!

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Wish I was brave enough to love them back. I don't know. Maybe you should try it.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: We don't have as much time as we think. Ooo eee.

name: Rick
line: Ugh, guess this is how it ends. I thought I was better than this. Dramatic voiceover while stranded in space? I-I guess when you're dying, the first thing to go is your creativity. Citadel's gone, and-and the saucer we escaped in is out of power.

name: Alternate Morty
line: Oh man, I'm so scared in here …

name: Rick
line: The extra Mortys went feral—

name: Alternate Morty
line: Gahhhh!

name: Rick
line: (cont'd) —Eh, some problems solve themselves. Been drinking a lot—Morty! I told you to write this down! I-I don't have a helmet like that Avengers guy did!—been drinking a lot of my piss. Portal Gun's still broken.

name: Morty
line: (interrupting) Guess that was all part of Evil Morty's plan.

name: Rick
line: 'Evil Morty'. Can we stop flattering this guy? His plan was to monologue and fuck off! He basically threw a tantrum to announce he was quitting Twitter!

name: Morty
line: Nobody quits Twitter. (pauses) Hey, remember, like a second ago, when you pretended to not know who Iron Man was. Who was that for?

name: Rick
line: Shh, shh, shush, Morty. This is how we go. Bear it with grace. (addressing cybernetics) Spinal cord, Robitussin as a base, then surprise me. (groans)

name: Morty
line: Mom!

name: Rick
line: Beth, maybe!

name: Rick
line: Is she trying to say something? (yells) We-we can't hear you! How dumb are... Beth, you're in a vacuum! Sound travels on air! [He puts his head in his hands] Why am I yelling?

name: Space Beth
line: (in text) Is this a private party Or can anyone join?

name: Morty
line: (rolls eyes) Wow, great.

name: Rick
line: (obvious distaste) Yeah, that's... Wow, really worth it. That was not worth it! It's corny! (gestures) You! Corn! Dying of starvation here!

name: Space Beth
line: (in text) When I decided to say it, I didn't know it would be...

name: Morty
line: Oh, my God. Stop explaining. (yells) Stop explaining!

name: Space Beth
line: (in text) ... subjected to this scrutiny.

name: Rick
line: Are you finished? (pauses, exasperated) She's not finished.

name: Space Beth
line: (in text) Maybe I won't rescue you.

name: Rick
line: Oh, real mature!

name: Morty
line: Oh, nice.

name: Rick
line: R-real classy.

name: Rick
line: (reassuringly) It was a good line, honey.

name: Space Beth
line: (with disdain) I didn't need it to be. I don't care what you think.

name: Home Beth
line: (relieved) Oh my god, she found you. Here, eat. Eat.

name: Morty
line: Oh hell yes!

name: Rick
line: Hold on, buddy. Our systems could go into shock from solid food. (addressing robot which rolls out from the garage) Digestibot, convert to nutrient mass.

name: Rick
line: I'm just gonna risk it.

name: Home Beth
line: Since when do you guys get stranded? (turns to Space Beth) Thank you, by the way.

name: Space Beth
line: Almost left them out there.

name: Rick
line: Portal travel's broken. [He takes another bite.] Mmm. Are these heirloom tomatoes? Digestibot, try these.

name: Digestibot
line: Yum. Yum.

name: Home Beth
line: So you can't hop realities anymore? Does that mean you'll finally have to wash your robe?

name: Rick
line: Good point. They need to reboot the Portal Index immediately.

name: Rick
line: Basically just a hard reset on the fluid. Hold tight, the Earth's gonna shake a bit.

name: Space Beth
line: Uhh …

name: Home Beth
line: Oh!

name: Rick
line: (claps a hand to his forehead) Oh, shit.

name: Morty
line: (looks at his flashing hands) Wait, what? What's happening?

name: Rick
line: Instead of resetting portal travel, I may have reset portal travellers. Too late to apologise.

name: Jerry
line: Rick, why am I pulsing green? And don't say you don't know, because you're pulsing green.

name: Morty
line: (worried) Rick, are we about to die?

name: Rick
line: (annoyed) No, we're about to vanish from this reality.

name: Jerry
line: That's totally dying!

name: Rick
line: No it isn't! It's everyone from this reality returning to their reality of origin.

name: Morty
line: Back to our original universes!

name: Rick
line: I explained it fine, Morty. You're spoonfeeding spoons. Where is Summer?

name: Summer
line: Oh nice, you guys are back. [She notices the flashing.] Whoa.

name: Rick
line: (urgently) Summer, three of us are one-way blind-hopping. You gotta help us get back. There's a protocol for this in your chores server, filename 'booger-aids'.

name: Summer
line: Every file is 'booger-aids'!

name: Rick
line: I—I hate naming things! Just search for words like 'one-way blind-hop, reset map beacon'.

name: Jerry
line: (terrified) Why do I have a reality of origin?

name: Rick
line: There's no time to explain, Jerry. Counting on you, Summer! One-way blind-hop beacon protocol. (raises arms in excitement) Here we gooooo!

name: Jerry
line: So there was time to explain.

name: Rick
line: Don't waste extra precious seconds with your pettiness, Jerry! (to Summer) Summer, let's run down—

name: Summer
line: One-way blind-hop reset beacon, 'booger-aids'.

name: Rick
line: (surprised) Cool. [Long pause.] Wow.

name: Jerry
line: (outraged) There was so much time to explain!

name: Rick
line: Yes, fine! Hindsight is 20-20. Who has ever taken this long to vanish?

name: Jerry
line: How did I end up not in my own universe? (realises) Oh, my god. The Jerryboree.

name: Rick and Morty
line: (deadpan) Oh, the Jerryboree!

name: Rick
line: (mockingly) Deep cut.

name: Home Beth
line: Wait, but where's our real dad and our real Morty?

name: Summer
line: (cuts in) Buried in the backyard. [She disappears from view.]

name: Home Beth
line: That's what the possums are after.

name: Space Beth
line: Dad's got you in the family business too, huh?

name: Summer
line: Yeah, Morty's an easy mark, but Rick pays me in things like …

name: Summer
line: (cont'd) Wolverine claws.

name: Space Beth
line: Well, looks like you got this. See you guys in another—two years? [She turns to leave.]

name: Summer
line: Or you could stick around for this one? Looks like it involves Grandpa's grotty citadel. (pleading) We could, you know, break things, loot stuff.

name: Space Beth
line: (hesitates) I should … probably get back to … saving the galaxy.

name: Summer
line: Please?

name: Space Beth
line: (gives in) Guess I could loot some stuff. Fine. Yeah. Okay. Let's make it quick.

name: Home Beth
line: (feigns excitement) Awesome, I've never been. Let's do this. Okay. Adventure family. Woo! (laughs)

name: Summer
line: Uhh … Okay!

name: Rick
line: Fuck.

name: Rick Prime
line: (offended) Excuse me? Bro, Ricks don't pass on this.

name: Voice
line: Rick, is that you?

name: Rick
line: (defeated) Yeah, Diane.

name: Diane
line: You've been gone so long. (passive-aggressively) Did you find our daughter's killer?

name: Rick
line: Not yet, sorry. Still looking. [He blows the dust off a hidden safe.]

name: Diane
line: You'll find him. You always do everything you set your mind to, except keep your family alive. But that was hardly your fault.

name: Rick
line: (ashamed, to the AI) Mute.

name: Diane
line: (distorted) If I could be muted, I wouldn't be too-too-too good at haunting you, would I, you dirty bear?

name: Rick
line: Yeah. I forgot I wanted to be haunted. [He keys in the code to the safe. He reaches in and pulls out a bottle of liquor and a tumbler glass.]

name: Diane
line: I guess you predicted you might. That's where haunting comes in handy, huh?

name: Rick
line: Very good point, sugar.

name: Morty
line: Rick?

name: Morty
line: Hello? Original family? Sorry about last time. Rick, he was in space prison. We couldn't just—hello?

name: Morty
line: Aaaah!

name: Morty
line: (disgusted) Aw, geez.

name: Morty
line: Ah!

name: Morty
line: (aroused) Oh!

name: Jerry Prime
line: Agh! Ah, fuck! Dammit Morty, there's no doctors anymore.

name: Morty
line: (in disbelief) Dad!?

name: Home Beth
line: Figures it's underwhelming, the one time I visit.

name: Summer
line: Yeah, sorry, usually, there's cowboy Rick and Mortys and stuff.

name: Home Beth
line: Looks like they could use a couple repairmen Ricks and Mortys, right?

name: Summer
line: Oh, tight! Little scavenger dudes. If they shoot at us, I'm allowed to …

name: Summer
line: (cont'd) do this. [She unsheathes her claws and dashes at the scavengers.] Shit, yeah.

name: Summer
line: Space Mom, get in on this!

name: Summer
line: Cool Mom.

name: Space Beth
line: Let's keep it moving. I don't have all day.

name: Home Beth
line: I got it! I got it. (to the straggler) Sorry! [She fires again.] Sorry! [And again.] I got it. Sorry!

name: Home Beth
line: (awkwardly) I was … gonna do it …

name: Summer
line: (to Space Beth, mockingly) Ugh, terrestrials, am I right?

name: Diane
line: I kept up the search in your absence. You want a new list of potential locations?

name: Rick
line: You're always just one room away, huh? [He grabs a bottle of beer from the kitchen fridge.]

name: Diane
line: Yeah. Remember, if you thought you could see or touch me, it might give you a level of (distorted) com-com-comfort.

name: Rick
line: Right, can't have that. Come on, Summer. [He pulls up an image of the rift under the Citadel. The coordinates he is aiming for are undetermined.]

name: Diane
line: Who's Summer? Should I be jealous? I hope (distorted) Summer knows what happens to the people you love!

name: Old Man
line: Hey, Rick!

name: Rick
line: Hey, Mr Goldmanbachmajorian. S-still alive, huh? What's up?

name: Mr. GBM
line: I was hoping you could help me make sense of a note I found this morning? It's written by someone claiming to be me. They say my mind is 'held captive in a time loop, trapped in the day of a traumatic event by the agony of a formidable intelligence, but also that my captor forgot about aging, that my body spoils and yearns for death while my soul remains stuck in place, caught like a fly in amber.'

name: Rick
line: (with guilt) Right. I used to drink drink. (turns to Mr. GBM) Uhh … no clue pal.

name: Mr. GBM
line: That's okay. I found other notes in the trash just like it. Poor weirdo. I pity them. Wish they could let go and move on.

name: Rick
line: Sounds healthy.

name: Mr. GBM
line: Sure would be!

name: Mr. GBM
line: Aaah, sweet death!

name: Diane
line: Was that symbolic? Are you letting go? I understand, baby. I forgive you!

name: Rick
line: (cuts in from inside the cruiser, furious) You don't get to say that, you're not her! You're a thing I built to torture myself. (aside) This whole fucking timeline is cursed. I gotta get out of here.

name: Diane
line: Because you want to move on.

name: Rick
line: Because I don't! And (burps) I have to. I came back on accident. The guy I'm looking for, he's... he's not findable, Diane. [He closes his eyes in regret.] I live with a version of Beth now.

name: Diane
line: Sounds like a version of nice.

name: Rick
line: We have grandkids. That's who Summer is. She's going to get me out of here. (looks towards the empty doorway) She reminds me of you.

name: Diane
line: Oh really? Is she dead too?

name: Rick
line: (ignores her, despondent) Bye, Diane.

name: Diane
line: You're not honestly going to fly into that rift without coordinates, are you? Don't give up on us, Rick. I don't make the rules. Haunters gonna haunt.

name: Diane
line: Baby, are you killing yourself?

name: Rick
line: I'm more embracing the win-win of risking my life.

name: Morty
line: Where's Mom and Summer?

name: Jerry Prime
line: Oh, they're gone. Sorry, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Gone gone?

name: Jerry Prime
line: We spent a long time in that ice. A gentle mutant licked us out, but Beth got sick and Summer... didn't thaw right.

name: Jerry Prime
line: With no one left to blame, I finally had to deal with myself. Buried my grief at Barnes & Noble. 'Four Agreements', 'Eat Pray Love', Frank Miller's 'The Dark Knight Returns'. Learned to accept things for what they are.

name: Jerry Prime
line: In a few of these, the whole brain is still intact. Makes you wonder if some people were still in there, (cuts open the brain using a cleaver) just trapped in the horror. Anyway, it's awesome protein.

name: Morty
line: I'm so sorry, Dad. But my real, original Dad beat the apocalypse. I-I-I guess we all underestimated you. Hey, w-what's that game we always try to play as a family, y—the one we never finished?

name: Jerry Prime
line: Downbeat.

name: Morty
line: Yes! Let's play Downbeat. I-I bet I can find it! We can finish now!

name: Jerry Prime
line: Yeah, you should totally do that.

name: Morty
line: Hey, yeah, cool, I-I got it! We'll play Downbeat and we'll-we'll camp here tonight and then rebuild the house. (Starts carrying the box out of the room and downstairs) You know, we got food, fresh water, and we've got family.

name: Morty
line: The fuck? (drops the game and runs over to read the note on the sofa)

name: Jerry Prime
line: (written) Morty. I wrote this note in advance in case you're wondering how I left so fast. My plan is to wait for you to turn your back, them I'm going to grab all your shit and split. Depending on how long you were out of the room, you'll probably be thinking I can't be that far away and you'll want to foll—

name: Jerry Prime
line: (written) Morty, wrote this fast 'cause had to set trap. Thought you'd have cooler shit. See other note. Bye.

name: Morty
line: Motherfu— [Black Screen]

name: Morty
line: (offscreen) Whoa, whoa! Slow down! Slow down!

name: Morty
line: Not cool! Oh!

name: Morty
line: What the hell, Dad?

name: Jerry Prime
line: Don't take it personal, Morty. That's one of the Four Agreements. I don't remember the other three, but I know Commissioner Gordon was cool with Batman moving on.

name: Morty
line: Batman doesn't abandon people!

name: Jerry Prime
line: You abandoned us.

name: Morty
line: I deserve that. But, you know, it... it improved you.

name: Jerry Prime
line: Oh, am I cool enough for you now? Well, that was easy, it only cost me fucking everything!

name: Morty
line: Whoa, hey, I-I—

name: Jerry Prime
line: You came back and talked about us like we weren't people, Morty! Then you bailed and left us to freeze!

name: Morty
line: I-I was apologizing for that earlier—

name: Jerry Prime
line: Your mom and sister died, Morty! (sighs) And I moved on. From caring. And that is the best deal you will ever get. So take it.

name: Morty
line: Please don't go! I-if Rick comes back, we ca-we can find you a new reality. A new Mom, a new Summer, a... job!

name: Jerry Prime
line: Oh, you don't get it, kid. Except for this conversation, my life is perfect. Rick was always right. (starts to leave) Everyone needs to let go.

name: Morty
line: Aww, you came back. I guess we really did form a bond.

name: Morty
line: Ow! Hey, stop it! Get away from me! (The Cronenberg roars and chases Morty.) No! Help!

name: Summer
line: Alright, pin dropped, Grandpa!

name: Summer
line: Come and get us.

name: Rick
line: Come on, come on, come on!

name: Diane
line: Baby? Something to keep in mind—if you were pulled home by whatever happened, it's likely our target was, as well. It's also likely he's having as much trouble leaving as you are.

name: Rick
line: He's trapped.

name: Summer
line: Grandpa!

name: Rick
line: Oh, fuck yes!

name: Summer
line: Grandpa—Grandpa?

name: Rick
line: Summer! Gold star, always believed in you. N-now the hard part.

name: Summer
line: Hard part?

name: Rick
line: Way worse things than me can see that beacon, too. Hunker down and protect it while I grab Morty. Rick out! Try to survive!

name: Summer
line: Oh, shit. (The space monsters start heading toward them) Domestic Mom should hide, maybe?

name: Home Beth
line: 'Domestic Mom?'

name: Summer
line: I mean, she's the cool space one.

name: Space Beth
line: Look, I'm not looking to get caught in whatever this is. You guys can both hide maybe, hash it out.

name: Home Beth
line: Oh, quit talking down. I'm you with the patience to do laundry.

name: Summer
line: Mom, stop being jealous of our bond!

name: Home Beth
line: She ran from our choices. I have to parent them.

name: Space Beth
line: It's not like I didn't care. That's what the clone was for. Aah!

name: Summer
line: Moms!

name: Rick
line: Morty!

name: Morty
line: Rick? I knew it! I knew you wouldn't leave me!

name: Morty
line: Ow! The fuck?

name: Rick
line: Morty, did you see another Rick here? Nondescript haircut, sci-fi jacket? (The device on his wrist displays a holographic map of the universe) Eh, of course you didn't see him, you'd be dead. Or you'd be a bomb. Do you feel bomby? Nah, you woulda blown up by now.

name: Morty
line: Wasn't the Rick here dead? Th-th-that's why you pick places, right?

name: Rick
line: Uh, well, your Rick, uh, yeah, not dead, more like, not around. When I met you, I was sorta hoping he might turn up one day—(a location of the holographic map starts to beep) You son of a bitch! I got you!

name: Morty
line: W-w-where are we going?

name: Rick
line: To kill your grandpa, little buddy.

name: Morty
line: Wait, what?

name: Morty
line: I don't understand. My original Rick killed your family? And you were just waiting for him to come back?

name: Rick
line: Seems like you understand fine, Morty. That was A+ re-piping. (Space Cruiser stops) We're here.

name: Rick
line: This guy, Morty, he hates being found but loves building elaborate shit. Like-like-like playing a ton of Minecraft but all on a private server.

name: Morty
line: Am I in a fucking K-hole right now? What is going on?

name: Rick Prime
line: (on a pre-recorded video displayed on a hologram projection) Whoa-ho-ho, you found me!

name: Rick Prime
line: I shoot the first monitor, too. Listen, I'm not here. Or am I?

name: Rick Prime
line: There's the clone you found! Or maybe it's me, all naked! Just a lil' Keyser Soze. I mean, why would I admit it's not?

name: Rick Prime
line: Oh-hoho, yeah! Look at him! Look at him go! Look at him dance! O-or me. Again, it might be me, like a 'Saw' thing. I'm very sneaky. Here's a bunch of killbots to deal with while ya wrestle with that.

name: Rick Prime
line: Obviously, I don't know who I'm talking to here.

name: Rick Prime
line: It's all prerecorded.

name: Rick Prime
line: But if you got this far, you probably think you're real special. Tell you what...

name: Rick Prime
line: Oop! There he goes! Maybe that actually was me! If you follow him down there, we can do a big fight. Fifty percent chance I'm not lying.

name: Space Beth
line: (through the communication device in the Space Cruiser) We're in trouble, asshole! I shouldn't have to beg.

name: Morty
line: Wait, my moms are in trouble?

name: Rick
line: Those versions of them are.

name: Morty
line: W-we gotta save them! Rick, this is an obvious trap. If you go down there he's just gonna kill you.

name: Rick
line: Good!

name: Morty
line: What? (Gets out of the cruiser)

name: Rick
line: Now what?

name: Morty
line: If you don't care if you die, why do you care if I die?

name: Rick
line: Knock it off! Get out of here! You did this last season! You're like a suicide bomber!

name: Morty
line: Takes one to know one.

name: Rick
line: Yeah, well, you get it from him, not me.

name: Morty
line: I don't know him. You're my grandpa, Rick. Rick and Morty. A hundred years.

name: Rick Prime
line: This place totally might go up, by the way. Here's a bunch of countdowns. One of them's probably accurate.

name: Space Beth
line: Ah, fucking stupid 5th-dimensional stomach juices.

name: Home Beth
line: Sorry for the sitcom fight, and maybe getting us digested.

name: Space Beth
line: You've got incredible timing.

name: Home Beth
line: Oh, don't be a bitch. I'm parenting. Makes sense you don't recognize it. You've been out of practice for a while.

name: Space Beth
line: Good! I'm glad that they have you! I don't want to be 'Space Mom.'

name: Home Beth
line: You've made that clear. Just don't let Summer mistake your rejection of her for good taste.

name: Space Beth
line: I'm not trying to. It's all her!

name: Summer
line: Jesus! It'd be cool if you were around more. I don't wanna get married. I'm 17. My affection is the wind. Don't try to compete for it. (pauses) I could hear every word of that through the helmets. Thank fuck I only had to kill most of them.

name: Home Beth
line: Jesus, that ship really has sailed.

name: Space Beast
line: And now... we feast!

name: Rick
line: This emergency was oversold to me.

name: Summer
line: Grandpa!

name: Home Beth & Space Beth
line: Morty!

name: Morty
line: Moms!

name: Morty
line: Wait, i-if they had to wear helmets—

name: Rick
line: I do childproofing stuff while you're asleep.

name: Morty
line: Why don't you childproof Dad?

name: Home Beth
line: Ah, great reminder.

name: Rick
line: Wait!

name: Home Beth
line: Time to get Jerry.

name: Rick
line: Ugh.

name: Beth 5126
line: Maybe I wouldn't be so uptight if I wasn't married to an unemployed receptacle of human fear!

name: Summer 5126
line: Get a job, Dad, it's been a decade.

name: Rick 5126
line: Whoof. Pretty brutal, Jer. I-I know a good alligator park if you wanna kill yourself.

name: Morty 5126
line: I got expelled today.

name: Beth 5126
line: What the hell, Morty?!

name: Rick 5126
line: Oh, no, you got expelled. Whoa, what a horrible thing.

name: Beth 5126
line: You are so fucking dumb!

name: Rick 5126
line: Too bad, Morty.

name: Home Beth
line: Hi, hon.

name: Rick
line: Whoof, some real Season 2 vibes in there, you know what I'm sayin'?

name: Jerry
line: (to Home Beth) You know, never thought I'd say this, but I think I'm glad we spent that time divorced.

name: Jerry
line: Eh, one second.

name: Rick 5126
line: I'll build a fucking swing set in the backyard!

name: Beth 5126
line: What the hell Morty?

name: Jerry
line: You know, I may technically be from here. But I'm a goddamn interdimensional traveller now, and all of you—(flips everyone off)—can kiss my sci-fi ass.

name: Home Beth
line: It gets me every time.

name: Morty
line: Wow, what an amazing joke I just told. A-and also, what an adventure. You know, I guess it doesn't matter where we're from if we're together, huh? Good-good final moral thing.

name: Summer
line: This is everyone's original dimension now.

name: Rick
line: Great wrap-ups, kids.

name: Season 2 Jerry/Jerry C-131
line: Ugh, you're back.

name: Rick
line: Oh shit, Season 2 Jerry!

name: Season 2 Jerry
line: Look, before you bust my balls, can someone help with the shower? It's colder than Beth on her anniversary. Also... [Holding up a container with Mr. Frundles inside] Look what I found in Rick's room!

name: Mr. Frundles
line: Mmm, I'm Mr. Frundles!

name: Season 2 Jerry
line: I don't care how cute he is, we agreed! No Boogens in the house! [Releases Mr. Frundles from the container and onto the ground]

name: Rick
line: Wait, Season 2 Jerry! Don't!

name: Mr. Frundles
line: Nyaah! (Mr. Frundles bites Season 2 Jerry's leg, causing him to yelp and fall to the ground)

name: Morty
line: Oh!

name: Summer
line: Mr. Frundles!

name: Rick
line: Everybody in the car.

name: Mr. Frundles (Season 2 Jerry's Leg)
line: Mmm, I'm Mr. Frundles!

name: Jerry
line: Wait, but I thought he was Mr. Frundles. [Pointing to the original one]

name: Rick
line: Everybody in the car! Now!

name: Many species of Mr. Frundles
line: (voices overlapping each other) Mmm, I'm Mr. Frundles!

name: Beth
line: What the fuck Dad?! Why would you bring that thing into our house?

name: Rick
line: It was cute! Fuck we gotta find a new timeline now! You know how hard that shit is without portals? We gotta do the thing with the Rift and the beacon again! The whole fucking episode all over again! Car, fabricate some vomit bags.

name: Space Beth
line: Can't we just go back and fix it?

name: Mr. Frundles (Earth)
line: Mmm, I'm Mr. Frundles!

name: Summer
line: I can't believe portal travel's broken.

name: Rick
line: I'll get to it when I get to it.

name: Morty
line: Lift with your knees, Mom.

name: Home Beth
line: How many times have you done this?

name: Jerry
line: (grunts) Oh, God.

name: Home Beth
line: And you swear they die of natural causes?

name: Rick
line: Mm-hmm, yep.

name: Space Beth
line: The exact same as our old timeline? Even my stuff?

name: Rick
line: Bit of a rush job, actually, so they do say 'parmesan' weird.

name: Morty
line: How do they say—

name: Rick
line: Par-mees-ian.

name: Summer
line: Boo.

name: Jerry
line: Jesus Christ.

name: Rick
line: I could've left you guys! You think the concept of family matters to me? I'm not even your Rick!

name: Summer
line: Uh-huh.

name: Jerry
line: 'I'm Denial Rick!'

name: Home Beth
line: See you inside, Dad.

name: Home Beth
line: Sorry I was such a Dance Mom about Summer. She's your daughter too.

name: Space Beth
line: No, boundaries are good. But, uh, speaking of, maybe I've put up too many. Is it okay if I come around sometimes?

name: Home Beth
line: That could be nice.

name: Space Beth
line: That's a cute outfit.

name: Home Beth
line: The one we always wear?

name: Rick
line: (sighs) Yes, Morty?

name: Morty
line: You promise I'm not, you know, bait? T-to make that Rick come back?

name: Rick
line: What? M-Morty, for you to be bait, the guy'd have to value something. He truly does not give a shit. (pauses) He's the real deal.

name: Morty
line: Parmeee...san...

name: Rick
line: Par-meee-sian. Par-meee-sian.

name: Morty
line: Par...par-meee-sian.

name: Rick
line: Par-me-sian.

name: Morty
line: Gross.

name: Rick
line: Yeah.

name: Morty
line: I hate it.

name: Jerry Prime
line: Hello? Morty? That one big Rat?

name: Rick Prime
line: Whoa, this is a development.

name: Jerry Prime
line: Gah!

name: Rick Prime
line: Shh. Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa, lil guy. Easy. You're a Jerry, right? Never got too close to the concept. Boy, you have really arc'd out.

name: Jerry Prime
line: Were you putting on pants?

name: Rick Prime
line: What? Oh, yeah, no, I was naked to fuck with a guy. Speaking of, did you talk to me, or a little kid around here?

name: Jerry Prime
line: Maybe. Why? Because if you hate them, too... I could be down for a little team up.

name: Rick Prime
line: Eh, I really don't 'team up' anymore. Managing people, such a headache. Aah!

name: Jerry Prime
line: Fatality. Jerry wins!

name: Rick Prime
line: Oh goddamn dude! Badass!

name: Jerry Prime
line: Why are you here?

name: Rick Prime
line: Buddy, I have been asking myself that exact same question.

line: Neon, plaid, orange

line: Denied.

Stay awake. All night.

fantastic chow mein.

line: Ah! Ah! No!

Because
they breed via incest?

line: Fucking cameras everywhere.

line: Jerry!

The zoo. Animals.
